mapper.sql: id, party_operation_id, party_member_id, party_id, user_id, member_status, invite_sent_at, must_complete_by, confirmed_at, completed_at, activated_at, last_reset_at, penalty_applied, operation_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_operation_member ( party_operation_id, party_member_id, party_id, user_id, member_status, invite_sent_at, must_complete_by, confirmed_at, completed_at, activated_at, last_reset_at, penalty_applied, operation_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyOperationId}, #{partyMemberId}, #{partyId}, #{userId}, #{memberStatus}, #{inviteSentAt}, #{mustCompleteBy}, #{confirmedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{activatedAt}, #{lastResetAt}, #{penaltyApplied}, #{operationMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM party_operation_member WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM party_operation_member WHERE party_operation_id = #{partyOperationId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT pom.id, pom.party_member_id, pom.user_id, u.nickname, u.submate_email, pom.member_status, pom.invite_sent_at, pom.must_complete_by, pom.confirmed_at, pom.completed_at, pom.activated_at, pom.last_reset_at, pom.penalty_applied, pom.operation_message FROM party_operation_member pom INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = pom.user_id WHERE pom.party_operation_id = #{partyOperationId} ORDER BY pom.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party_operation_member WHERE party_operation_id = #{partyOperationId} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT pom.id, pom.party_operation_id, pom.party_member_id, pom.party_id, pom.user_id, pom.member_status, pom.invite_sent_at, pom.must_complete_by, pom.confirmed_at, pom.completed_at, pom.activated_at, pom.last_reset_at, pom.penalty_applied, pom.operation_message, pom.created_at, pom.updated_at FROM party_operation_member pom INNER JOIN party p ON p.id = pom.party_id WHERE pom.member_status = 'REQUIRED' AND pom.invite_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND pom.invite_sent_at <= DATEADD('HOUR', -#{thresholdHours}, NOW()) AND pom.penalty_applied = FALSE AND p.operation_status != 'TERMINATED'
mapper.update: UPDATE party_operation_member SET member_status = #{memberStatus}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, activated_at = #{activatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE party_operation_member SET member_status = #{memberStatus}, operation_message = #{operationMessage}, last_reset_at = #{lastResetAt}, confirmed_at = NULL, completed_at = NULL, activated_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE party_operation_id = #{partyOperationId}
mapper.select: SELECT pom.id, pom.party_operation_id, pom.party_member_id, pom.party_id, pom.user_id, pom.member_status, pom.invite_sent_at, pom.must_complete_by, pom.confirmed_at, pom.completed_at, pom.activated_at, pom.last_reset_at, pom.penalty_applied, pom.operation_message, pom.created_at, pom.updated_at FROM party_operation_member pom INNER JOIN party p ON p.id = pom.party_id WHERE pom.member_status = 'REQUIRED' AND pom.penalty_applied = FALSE AND pom.invite_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pom.invite_sent_at, NOW()) >= #{elapsedHours} AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pom.invite_sent_at, NOW()) < #{elapsedHours} + 1 AND p.operation_status != 'TERMINATED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notification n WHERE n.party_id = pom.party_id AND n.user_id = pom.user_id AND n.type IN ('PROVISION_ACCOUNT_SHARED_REMINDER', 'PROVISION_INVITE_ACCEPT_REQUIRED') )
